name: planexe-cli
description: PlanExe CLI — AI planning and coding agent

scripts.preuninstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const os = require('os'); const binaryPath = path.join(os.homedir(), '.config', 'planexe', process.platform === 'win32' ? 'planexe.exe' : 'planexe'); try { fs.unlinkSync(binaryPath) } catch (e) { /* ignore if file doesn't exist */ }"
